data.content: Approved in implementation_review. Reviewed branch knots-3918-codex-project-skills (commit 1d83d29) against the knot description and acceptance criteria. Verified Codex now prefers project .agents/skills with ~/.codex fallback in src/managed_skills.rs, and the managed-skills tests cover project install preference, user fallback, doctor detection, doctor --fix reconciliation, updated root hints, and updated location counts. Validation passed with cargo test managed_skills, direct target/debug/knots smoke checks for project-level Codex install/doctor, and make sanity; coverage finished at 95.03% (11804/12421). No invariant, security, or regression issues found.
